stemHtml: What is the effect of ice accretion on a propeller?

options.a: Icing forms on the inner part of the propeller and reduces its efficiency by 20%.
options.b: Icing forms on the outer part of the propeller and reduces efficiency by 30%.
options.c: Icing does not form on a propeller and has no impact on its efficiency.
options.d: Icing forms on the outer part of the propeller and reduces efficiency by 25%.
